---
title: "TIER2 Recommendation Bubble Plot"
subtitle: "Interactive Stakeholder and Category View"
date: today
format:
  html:
    self-contained: true
    theme: litera
    toc: false
    page-layout: full
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{=html}
<style>
  body { background: #FFFFFF; color: #0D2557; }
  .quarto-title-block .title {
    color: #0D2557;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: -0.3px;
  }
  .quarto-title-block .subtitle {
    color: #32dbce;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-size: 1.05rem;
    letter-spacing: 0.4px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
  }
  .quarto-title-block + hr, hr {
    border: none;
    border-top: 2px solid #32dbce;
    opacity: 1;
    margin: 1rem 0 1.4rem;
  }
  .quarto-document-content > p:first-of-type {
    color: #3a4f7a;
    font-size: 0.95rem;
    line-height: 1.7;
  }
</style>
```

This interactive bubble plot maps recommendations across stakeholder groups and thematic categories. Use the category chips or stakeholder filters to focus the display, and click any bubble to view the full recommendation below.

---

```{r}
#| label: setup

library(readxl)

df <- read_excel("TIER2_recommendations.xlsx") |>
  setNames(c("id", "title", "description", "category", "stakeholder"))

recs_list <- lapply(seq_len(nrow(df)), function(i) {
  list(
    id = trimws(as.character(df$id[i])),
    title = trimws(df$title[i]),
    desc = trimws(df$description[i]),
    cat = trimws(df$category[i]),
    stks = as.list(trimws(strsplit(trimws(df$stakeholder[i]), ";")[[1]]))
  )
})

ojs_define(recs_raw = recs_list)
```

```{ojs}
//| label: bubble-plot

recs = recs_raw

cats = [
  {
    label: "Infrastructure & standards",
    match: "Infrastructure, standards and community",
    color: "#0D2557",
    bg: "#dce3f0",
    tx: "#0D2557"
  },
  {
    label: "Incentives & policy",
    match: "Incentives and policy",
    color: "#32dbce",
    bg: "#d6f8f5",
    tx: "#084845"
  },
  {
    label: "Training & skills",
    match: "Training and skills",
    color: "#1a7fc4",
    bg: "#daeaf8",
    tx: "#0a3358"
  },
  {
    label: "Evidence-based policy",
    match: "Evidence-based policy",
    color: "#4E9B8E",
    bg: "#E3F3F0",
    tx: "#1F4F49"
  }
]

stakeholders = [
  { name: "Funders", icon: "💰" },
  { name: "Publishers", icon: "📖" },
  { name: "Institutions", icon: "🏛️" },
  { name: "Research Communities", icon: "🔬" },
  { name: "Meta-Researchers", icon: "📊" }
]

bubbleData = {
  const points = []
  recs.forEach(rec => {
    const cat = cats.find(c => c.match === rec.cat.trim())
    rec.stks.forEach(stk => {
      points.push({
        id: `${rec.id}-${stk.trim()}`,
        recId: rec.id,
        title: rec.title,
        desc: rec.desc,
        category: cat,
        stakeholder: stk.trim()
      })
    })
  })
  return points
}

bubbleWidget = {
  const style = document.createElement("style")
  style.textContent = `
    .t2b-wrap { font-family: system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif; }
    .t2b-legend, .t2b-stakeholders, .t2b-controls { display:flex; flex-wrap:wrap; gap:8px; align-items:center; margin-bottom:12px; }
    .t2b-label { font-size:11px; font-weight:600; color:#6b7ea8; text-transform:uppercase; letter-spacing:.6px; margin-right:4px; }
    .t2b-chip, .t2b-filter {
      display:inline-block; padding:5px 12px; border-radius:999px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600;
      border:1.5px solid transparent; cursor:pointer; transition:opacity .15s, transform .15s, box-shadow .15s;
    }
    .t2b-filter { background:#f7f9fc; color:#3a4f7a; border-color:#d8e0ef; }
    .t2b-chip:hover, .t2b-filter:hover { opacity:.85; transform:translateY(-1px); }
    .t2b-chip.active, .t2b-filter.active { box-shadow:0 0 0 2px #0D2557; }
    .t2b-chip.dim, .t2b-filter.dim { opacity:.35; }
    .t2b-reset {
      border:1.5px solid #c5cce0; background:#FFFFFF; color:#0D2557; border-radius:999px;
      padding:5px 12px; font-size:12px; font-weight:600; cursor:pointer;
    }
    .t2b-reset[hidden] { display:none; }
    .t2b-note { font-size:12px; color:#6b7ea8; }
    .t2b-frame { border:1.5px solid #ebecf0; border-radius:12px; background:#FFFFFF; overflow:hidden; }
    .t2b-svg { display:block; width:100%; height:auto; background:#FFFFFF; }
    .t2b-axis { font-size:12px; fill:#0D2557; font-weight:600; }
    .t2b-grid { stroke:#eef2f8; stroke-width:1; }
    .t2b-cell-label { font-size:12px; fill:#8a99b8; font-weight:600; }
    .t2b-point { cursor:pointer; transition:opacity .15s; }
    .t2b-point.dim { opacity:.18; }
    .t2b-point.active .t2b-circle { stroke:#0D2557; stroke-width:3; }
    .t2b-circle { stroke-width:2; }
    .t2b-id { font-size:10px; font-weight:700; text-anchor:middle; dominant-baseline:middle; pointer-events:none; }
    .t2b-detail {
      border-left:4px solid #32dbce; border-radius:0 10px 10px 0; padding:18px 22px; margin-top:14px;
      background:#FFFFFF; border-top:1.5px solid #ebecf0; border-right:1.5px solid #ebecf0; border-bottom:1.5px solid #ebecf0;
      display:none;
    }
    .t2b-hint { font-size:12px; color:#8a99b8; margin-top:10px; margin-bottom:0; }
    .t2b-rec-chip, .t2b-tag {
      display:inline-block; padding:2px 10px; border-radius:12px; font-size:11px; margin:2px;
    }
    .t2b-rec-chip { font-weight:700; border:1.5px solid transparent; margin-right:8px; }
    .t2b-tag { border:1.5px solid #c5cce0; color:#0D2557; background:#ebecf0; font-weight:500; }
    .t2b-close { background:none; border:none; cursor:pointer; color:#8a99b8; font-size:22px; padding:0; line-height:1; }
  `

  const root = document.createElement("div")
  root.className = "t2b-wrap"
  root.appendChild(style)

  const categoryLegend = document.createElement("div")
  categoryLegend.className = "t2b-legend"
  categoryLegend.innerHTML =
    `<span class="t2b-label">Categories:</span>` +
    cats.map(cat =>
      `<span class="t2b-chip" data-category="${cat.match}" style="background:${cat.bg};color:${cat.tx};border-color:${cat.color}">
        ${cat.label}
      </span>`
    ).join("")
  root.appendChild(categoryLegend)

  const stakeholderLegend = document.createElement("div")
  stakeholderLegend.className = "t2b-stakeholders"
  stakeholderLegend.innerHTML =
    `<span class="t2b-label">Stakeholders:</span>` +
    stakeholders.map(stk =>
      `<span class="t2b-filter" data-stakeholder="${stk.name}">${stk.icon} ${stk.name}</span>`
    ).join("")
  root.appendChild(stakeholderLegend)

  const controls = document.createElement("div")
  controls.className = "t2b-controls"
  controls.innerHTML = `
    <button class="t2b-reset" id="t2b-reset" hidden>Reset filters</button>
    <span class="t2b-note" id="t2b-note">Click a category or stakeholder to filter, or click a bubble to view the recommendation.</span>
  `
  root.appendChild(controls)

  const frame = document.createElement("div")
  frame.className = "t2b-frame"

  const svgNS = "http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"
  const svg = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "svg")
  svg.setAttribute("viewBox", "0 0 1120 720")
  svg.setAttribute("class", "t2b-svg")

  const chart = { left: 170, right: 1060, top: 70, bottom: 610 }
  const width = chart.right - chart.left
  const height = chart.bottom - chart.top
  const colWidth = width / stakeholders.length
  const rowHeight = height / cats.length

  const active = { category: null, stakeholder: null, point: null }

  const detail = document.createElement("div")
  detail.className = "t2b-detail"

  const hint = document.createElement("p")
  hint.className = "t2b-hint"
  hint.textContent = "Click any bubble to view the full recommendation."

  function addText(x, y, text, cls, anchor = "middle") {
    const el = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "text")
    el.setAttribute("x", x)
    el.setAttribute("y", y)
    el.setAttribute("class", cls)
    el.setAttribute("text-anchor", anchor)
    el.textContent = text
    svg.appendChild(el)
    return el
  }

  for (let i = 0; i <= stakeholders.length; i += 1) {
    const line = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    const x = chart.left + i * colWidth
    line.setAttribute("x1", x)
    line.setAttribute("x2", x)
    line.setAttribute("y1", chart.top)
    line.setAttribute("y2", chart.bottom)
    line.setAttribute("class", "t2b-grid")
    svg.appendChild(line)
  }

  for (let i = 0; i <= cats.length; i += 1) {
    const line = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "line")
    const y = chart.top + i * rowHeight
    line.setAttribute("x1", chart.left)
    line.setAttribute("x2", chart.right)
    line.setAttribute("y1", y)
    line.setAttribute("y2", y)
    line.setAttribute("class", "t2b-grid")
    svg.appendChild(line)
  }

  stakeholders.forEach((stk, i) => {
    addText(chart.left + (i + 0.5) * colWidth, 42, stk.name, "t2b-axis")
  })

  cats.forEach((cat, i) => {
    addText(150, chart.top + (i + 0.52) * rowHeight, cat.label, "t2b-axis", "end")
  })

  const bubbleLayer = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "g")
  svg.appendChild(bubbleLayer)

  const grouped = new Map()
  bubbleData.forEach(point => {
    const key = `${point.category.match}__${point.stakeholder}`
    if (!grouped.has(key)) grouped.set(key, [])
    grouped.get(key).push(point)
  })

  const pointEntries = []
  grouped.forEach((points, key) => {
    const [categoryMatch, stakeholderName] = key.split("__")
    const row = cats.findIndex(cat => cat.match === categoryMatch)
    const col = stakeholders.findIndex(stk => stk.name === stakeholderName)
    const centerX = chart.left + (col + 0.5) * colWidth
    const centerY = chart.top + (row + 0.5) * rowHeight
    const patterns = {
      1: [[0, 0]],
      2: [[-30, 0], [30, 0]],
      3: [[0, -26], [-28, 18], [28, 18]],
      4: [[-28, -18], [28, -18], [-28, 18], [28, 18]]
    }
    const offsets = patterns[points.length] || points.map((_, i) => [((i % 3) - 1) * 28, (Math.floor(i / 3) - 0.5) * 24])

    points.forEach((point, i) => {
      const group = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "g")
      group.setAttribute("class", "t2b-point")
      group.setAttribute("transform", `translate(${centerX + offsets[i][0]}, ${centerY + offsets[i][1]})`)

      const circle = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "circle")
      circle.setAttribute("r", 24)
      circle.setAttribute("class", "t2b-circle")
      circle.setAttribute("fill", point.category.bg)
      circle.setAttribute("stroke", point.category.color)
      group.appendChild(circle)

      const label = document.createElementNS(svgNS, "text")
      label.setAttribute("class", "t2b-id")
      label.setAttribute("fill", point.category.tx)
      label.textContent = point.recId.replace(/\.$/, "")
      group.appendChild(label)

      group.addEventListener("click", () => {
        pointEntries.forEach(({ el }) => el.classList.remove("active"))
        active.point = point
        group.classList.add("active")
        renderDetail(point)
      })

      bubbleLayer.appendChild(group)
      pointEntries.push({ point, el: group })
    })
  })

  function renderDetail(point) {
    detail.style.display = "block"
    detail.style.borderLeftColor = point.category.color
    const rec = recs.find(r => r.id === point.recId)
    detail.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px">
        <div>
          <span class="t2b-rec-chip" style="background:${point.category.bg};color:${point.category.tx};border-color:${point.category.color}">${point.recId}</span>
          <span style="font-size:12px;color:#6b7ea8;font-weight:500">${point.category.label}</span>
        </div>
        <button class="t2b-close" id="t2b-close">×</button>
      </div>
      <p style="margin:0 0 8px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#0D2557;line-height:1.45">${point.title}</p>
      <p style="margin:0 0 14px;font-size:13px;color:#3a4f7a;line-height:1.75">${point.desc}</p>
      <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;align-items:center">
        <span style="font-size:12px;color:#8a99b8;margin-right:4px;font-weight:500">Stakeholder ownership:</span>
        ${rec.stks.map(stk => `<span class="t2b-tag">${stk.trim()}</span>`).join("")}
      </div>
    `
    detail.querySelector("#t2b-close").addEventListener("click", () => {
      detail.style.display = "none"
      hint.style.display = "block"
      pointEntries.forEach(({ el }) => el.classList.remove("active"))
      active.point = null
    })
    hint.style.display = "none"
  }

  function renderFilterDetail(matches) {
    const parts = []
    if (active.category) parts.push(cats.find(c => c.match === active.category)?.label || active.category)
    if (active.stakeholder) parts.push(active.stakeholder)
    const title = `Filtered recommendations: ${parts.join(" + ")}`
    detail.style.display = "block"
    detail.style.borderLeftColor = active.category ? (cats.find(c => c.match === active.category)?.color || "#32dbce") : "#32dbce"
    detail.innerHTML = `
      <div style="display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:flex-start;margin-bottom:10px">
        <div>
          <p style="margin:0 0 4px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#0D2557;line-height:1.45">${title}</p>
          <p style="margin:0;font-size:12px;color:#6b7ea8;line-height:1.6">${matches.length} recommendation${matches.length === 1 ? "" : "s"} match the current filter.</p>
        </div>
        <button class="t2b-close" id="t2b-close">×</button>
      </div>
      ${matches.map(point => {
        const rec = recs.find(r => r.id === point.recId)
        return `
          <div style="padding:12px 0 12px 12px;border-top:1px solid #ebecf0;border-left:3px solid ${point.category.color}">
            <div style="margin-bottom:8px">
              <span class="t2b-rec-chip" style="background:${point.category.bg};color:${point.category.tx};border-color:${point.category.color}">${point.recId}</span>
              <span style="font-size:12px;color:#6b7ea8;font-weight:500">${point.category.label} · ${point.stakeholder}</span>
            </div>
            <p style="margin:0 0 8px;font-size:15px;font-weight:600;color:#0D2557;line-height:1.45">${point.title}</p>
            <p style="margin:0 0 12px;font-size:13px;color:#3a4f7a;line-height:1.75">${point.desc}</p>
            <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:4px;align-items:center">
              <span style="font-size:12px;color:#8a99b8;margin-right:4px;font-weight:500">Stakeholder ownership:</span>
              ${rec.stks.map(stk => `<span class="t2b-tag">${stk.trim()}</span>`).join("")}
            </div>
          </div>
        `
      }).join("")}
    `
    detail.querySelector("#t2b-close").addEventListener("click", () => {
      active.category = null
      active.stakeholder = null
      updateFilters()
    })
    hint.style.display = "none"
  }

  function updateFilters() {
    const hasFilters = !!(active.category || active.stakeholder)

    categoryLegend.querySelectorAll(".t2b-chip").forEach(chip => {
      const match = chip.dataset.category === active.category
      chip.classList.toggle("active", match)
      chip.classList.toggle("dim", !!active.category && !match)
    })

    stakeholderLegend.querySelectorAll(".t2b-filter").forEach(chip => {
      const match = chip.dataset.stakeholder === active.stakeholder
      chip.classList.toggle("active", match)
      chip.classList.toggle("dim", !!active.stakeholder && !match)
    })

    const matches = []
    pointEntries.forEach(({ point, el }) => {
      const matchCategory = !active.category || point.category.match === active.category
      const matchStakeholder = !active.stakeholder || point.stakeholder === active.stakeholder
      const visible = matchCategory && matchStakeholder
      el.classList.toggle("dim", !visible)
      if (visible) matches.push(point)
    })

    controls.querySelector("#t2b-reset").hidden = !hasFilters
    if (!hasFilters) {
      controls.querySelector("#t2b-note").textContent = "Click a category or stakeholder to filter, or click a bubble to view the recommendation."
      if (!active.point) {
        detail.style.display = "none"
        hint.style.display = "block"
      }
    } else {
      const parts = []
      if (active.category) parts.push(cats.find(c => c.match === active.category)?.label || active.category)
      if (active.stakeholder) parts.push(active.stakeholder)
      controls.querySelector("#t2b-note").textContent = `Filtered by ${parts.join(" + ")}.`
      pointEntries.forEach(({ el }) => el.classList.remove("active"))
      active.point = null
      renderFilterDetail(matches)
    }
  }

  categoryLegend.addEventListener("click", e => {
    const chip = e.target.closest(".t2b-chip")
    if (!chip) return
    active.category = active.category === chip.dataset.category ? null : chip.dataset.category
    updateFilters()
  })

  stakeholderLegend.addEventListener("click", e => {
    const chip = e.target.closest(".t2b-filter")
    if (!chip) return
    active.stakeholder = active.stakeholder === chip.dataset.stakeholder ? null : chip.dataset.stakeholder
    updateFilters()
  })

  controls.querySelector("#t2b-reset").addEventListener("click", () => {
    active.category = null
    active.stakeholder = null
    updateFilters()
  })

  frame.appendChild(svg)
  root.appendChild(frame)
  root.appendChild(detail)
  root.appendChild(hint)

  updateFilters()

  return root
}
```
